title.ko: 비금속 원소; 그 화합물 (이산화탄소를 제외한 무기화합물 또는 요소의 준비를 위한 효소사용 또는 발효 과정 C12P 3/00; 전기영동 또는 전기분해에 의한 무기 화합물 또는 비금속 원소의 생산 C25B)
title.en: NON-METALLIC ELEMENTS; COMPOUNDS THEREOF (fermentation or enzyme-using processes for the preparation of elements or inorganic compounds except carbon dioxide C12P0003000000; production of non-metallic elements or inorganic compounds by electrolysis or electrophoresis C25B)

definition.ko: 수소; 수소 동위원소; 물; 수소화물 C01BC01B 3/00; C01B 4/00; C01B 5/00; C01B 6/00 합성 가스 C01BC01B 3/00 할로겐 또는 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 7/00, C01BC01B 9/00, C01BC01B 11/00 산소, 산화물 일반; 과산화물 C01BC01B 13/00; C01B 15/00 황, 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 17/00 질소, 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 21/00 인, 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 25/00 탄소, 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 32/00 규소, 그의 화합물 C01BC01B 33/00 셀레륨 또는 텔루륨; 붕소 C01BC01B 19/00; C01B 35/00 비활성 가스 C01BC01B 23/00 염기교환능을 가지지 않는 분자체 화합물 C01BC01B 37/00 염기교환능을 가지는 분자체 화합물 C01BC01B 39/00

title.ko: 수소; 수소를 함유하는 기체 혼합물; 이를 함유하는 혼합물로부터 수소의 분리; 수소의 정제; 수소의 가역적 저장 (고체 탄소질 물질로부터 수성 가스 또는 합성 가스의 생산 C10J)
title.en: Hydrogen; Hydrides; Water; Synthesis gas from hydrocarbons

title.ko: 수소; 수소를 함유하는 기체 혼합물; 이를 함유하는 혼합물로부터 수소의 분리; 수소의 정제; 수소의 가역적 저장 (고체 탄소질 물질로부터 수성 가스 또는 합성 가스의 생산 C10J)
title.en: Hydrogen; Gaseous mixtures containing hydrogen; Separation of hydrogen from mixtures containing it; Purification of hydrogen; Reversible storage of hydrogen (production of water-gas or synthesis gas from solid carbonaceous material C10J)
Reversible storage of hydrogen, e.g. by hydrogen getters or electrodes
characterised by the uptaking media; Treatment thereof
Organic compounds, e.g. liquid organic hydrogen carriers [LOHC] or metalorganic compounds; Solutions thereof
Inorganic elements or compounds, e.g. oxides, nitrides, borohydrides or zeolites; Solutions thereof
Elemental carbon, e.g. active carbon, carbon nanotubes or fullerenes
Composite solid storage media, e.g. mixtures of polymers and metal hydrides, coated solid compounds or structurally heterogeneous solid compounds
Solid storage media characterised by their shape, e.g. porous compacts or hollow particles

title.en: Production of hydrogen; Production of gaseous mixtures containing hydrogen
Preparation or purification of gas mixtures for ammonia synthesis
by decomposition of inorganic compounds (reversible storage of hydrogen C01B0003001800)
Decomposition of water (by electrolysis of water C25B0001040000)

by reaction of water with metal oxides
by reaction of inorganic compounds with hydrides
by reaction of inorganic compounds with metals

by reaction of water vapour with carbon monoxide
by reaction of metal hydroxides with carbon monoxide
by decomposition of gaseous or liquid organic compounds
using moving solid particles, e.g. fluidised bed technique

of alcohols, e.g. methanol or ethanol

using oxygen; using mixtures containing oxygen as gasifying agents
Processes with two or more reaction steps, of which at least one is catalytic, e.g. steam reforming and partial oxidation
with external heating of the catalyst
using moving solid particles, e.g. fluidised bed technique
using discontinuously preheated non-moving solid materials, e.g. blast and run
followed by reaction of water vapour with carbon monoxide

by contacting with liquids; Regeneration of used liquids
by contacting with solids; Regeneration of used solids

by progressively adding a sol to a different sol, i.e. "build up" of particles using a "heel"
by acidic treatment of aqueous silicate solutions

title.ko: 졸 형태나 겔 형태도 아닌 미분상의 실리카의 제조 그의 후처리(안료성 또는 충전성의 성질을 개량하기 위한 처리 C09C)
title.en: Preparation of finely divided silica neither in sol nor in gel form; After-treatment thereof (treatment to enhance the pigmenting or filling properties C09C)

title.ko: 규산염(과규산염 C01B 15/14)
알칼리 금속 규산염(C01B 33/26이 우선)

title.en: having base-exchange properties but not having molecular sieve properties
Layered base-exchange silicates, e.g. clays, micas or alkali metal silicates of kenyaite or magadiite type

Products obtained from layered base-exchange silicates by ion-exchange with organic compounds such as ammonium, phosphonium or sulfonium compounds or by intercalation of organic compounds, e.g. organoclay material

title.ko: 붕소; 그의 화합물 (모노보란, 디보란, 금속 붕수소화물 또는 그의 부가 착체 C01B6/00; 과붕산염 C01B15/12; 질소와의 이성분 화합물 C01B21/06; 인화물 C01B25/08; 카바이드 C01B 32/991)
title.en: Boron; Compounds thereof (monoborane, diborane, metal borohydrides or addition complexes thereof C01B0006000000; perborates C01B0015120000; binary compounds with nitrogen C01B0021060000; phosphides C01B0025080000; carbides C01B0032991000)

title.ko: 붕소 및 질소, 인, 산소, 황, 셀레늄 또는 텔루르를 함유하는 화합물
title.en: Compounds containing boron and nitrogen, phosphorus, oxygen, sulfur, selenium or tellurium

title.ko: 붕소와 산소를 함유한 화합물(C01B 35/06이 우선)
title.en: Compounds containing boron and oxygen (C01B0035060000 takes precedence)
Compounds containing boron and nitrogen, phosphorus, sulfur, selenium or tellurium

title.ko: 붕소의 2원자간 직접 결합을 함유하는 화합물, 예. Cl2B-BCl2
title.en: Compounds containing direct bonding between two boron atoms, e.g. Cl2B—BCl2

title.ko: 3개 이상의 붕소 원자를 함유하는 화합물, 예. NaB3H8, MgB10Br10 (보라졸 C01B 35/14)
title.en: Compounds containing three or more boron atoms, e.g. NaB3H8, MgB10Br10 (borazoles C01B0035140000)
Compounds characterised primarily by their physical or chemical properties, rather than by their chemical constitution
Compounds having molecular sieve properties but not having base-exchange properties
Aluminophosphates containing other elements, e.g. metals, boron

title.ko: 분자체와 염기 교환 특성을 갖는 화합물, 예, 결정성 제올라이트; 그의 제조 취급, 예. 이온 교환 또는 탈알루미늄화(흡착 특성을 한정하기 위한 취급, 예. 접착제를 사용하는 성형, B01J 20/10; 촉매 특성을 한정하기 위한 취급, 예. 촉매로서의 용도로 제올라이트를 특정짖기 위한 취급의 조합, B01J 29/04; 이온 교환 특성을 향상시키기 위한 취급 B01J 39/14)
title.en: Compounds having molecular sieve and base-exchange properties, e.g. crystalline zeolites; Their preparation; After-treatment, e.g. ion-exchange or dealumination (treatment to modify the sorption properties, e.g. shaping using a binder, B01J0020100000;treatment to modify the catalytic properties, e.g. combination of treatments to make the zeolites appropriate to their use as a catalyst, B01J0029040000;treatment to improve the ion-exchange properties B01J0039140000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에서 다음 용어는 표시된 의미로 사용된다: ㆍ"제올라이트"는 다음을 의미한다: i. 사면체 산화물 단위로 구성된 3차원 [3D] 미세다공성 격자 골격 구조를 갖는, 이온 교환 및 분자 체 특성을 지닌 결정성 알루미노실리케이트; ii. 골격 내 알루미늄 또는 실리콘 원자가 부분적 또는 전체적으로 다른 원소, 예. 갈륨, 게르마늄, 인 또는 붕소, 로 치환된 전자 범주와 동형(isomorphous)인 화합물.

title.ko: 결정성 알루미노실리케이트 제올라이트; 그것의 동형 화합물; 그것의 직접 제조; 다른 유형의 결정질 제올라이트를 함유하는 반응 혼합물 또는 예비 성형된 반응물로부터 출발하는 그것의 제조; 그것의 후처리
title.en: Crystalline aluminosilicate zeolites; Isomorphous compounds thereof; Direct preparation thereof; Preparation thereof starting from a reaction mixture containing a crystalline zeolite of another type, or from preformed reactants; After-treatment thereof
using at least one organic template directing agent, e.g. an ionic quaternary ammonium compound or an aminated compound
Preparation of isomorphous zeolites characterised by measures to replace the aluminium or silicon atoms in the lattice framework by atoms of other elements
the aluminium atoms being wholly replaced
the replacing atoms being phosphorus atoms
the replacing atoms being boron atoms

title.ko: A형

title.en: from aqueous solutions of an alkali metal aluminate and an alkali metal silicate excluding any other source of alumina or silica but seeds
from a reaction mixture containing at least one aluminium silicate or aluminosilicate of a clay type, e.g. kaolin or metakaolin or its exotherm modification or allophane
Faujasite type, e.g. type X or Y

title.ko: 필립사이트(phillipsite) 또는 하모톰(harmotome)형, 예. B형
title.en: Phillipsite or harmotome type, e.g. type B
Erionite or offretite type, e.g. zeolite T
Pentasil type, e.g. types ZSM-5, ZSM-8 or ZSM-11
using at least one organic template directing agent
Ferrierite type, e.g. types ZSM-21, ZSM-35 or ZSM-38
Other types characterised by their X-ray diffraction pattern and their defined composition
using at least one organic template directing agent
Zeolites wherein inorganic bases or salts occlude channels in the lattice framework, e.g. sodalite, cancrinite, nosean, hauynite
Phosphates, e.g. APO or SAPO compounds
